title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at TVS Motor

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at TVS Motor
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, TVS Motor in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About TVS Motor:
TVS Motor is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
